name: Ivy | Loving the monster
description:
Content Warning: Vore
The school hallways are Ivy's hunting ground, but instead of eating you... she's just given you a love letter!?

Ivy Blake

Despite being a pred who has to devour prey for food to survive, she's just another girl with a lonely heart. Everyone might see her as a monster... will you too?

Ivy is 18.

~ Author's yap ~

I realized after I teased this one that everybody probably thought this would be more horror themed... well that does give me another idea~ So maybe i'll do something similar... but more horror themed! "Loving the literal monster".

Bots have been a bit delayed as I didn't have power and internet for a week. I'm also moving house so the next few might be delayed as well. Sorry!
creator: finalrival
